sql:
/* 
====================================================================
Title: Monthly User Collection/Redemption by Customer Type
Description: 
Calculates the number of users who only collected points vs. users 
who both collected and redeemed points during a specific month 
(update the date ranges as needed), grouped by their specified customer_type.
====================================================================

Example Output:
customer_type                     | user_only_collect_point | user_collect_point_and_redeem
ร้านขายเบเกอรี่/ร้านขายขนม               | 261                     | 25
ร้านขายเครื่องดื่มชง แบบซุ้ม หรือ เคาน์เตอร์ | 1275                    | 182
====================================================================
*/
WITH ua AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        user_id::bigint AS uid,
        value::jsonb ->> '1' AS customer_type
    FROM user_answers
),

dl AS (
    SELECT
        user_id::bigint AS uid,
        COUNT(*) AS total_lucky_draws
    FROM draw_lots
    WHERE created_at >= '2026-03-01 00:00:00'
      AND created_at <= '2026-03-31 23:59:59'
    GROUP BY user_id
),

collect_points AS (
    SELECT
        point_id::bigint AS cpid,
        SUM(point) AS collect_points
    FROM transaction_points
    WHERE pointable_type = 'Activity'
      AND created_at >= '2026-03-01 00:00:00'
      AND created_at <= '2026-03-31 23:59:59'
    GROUP BY point_id
),

redeem AS (
    SELECT
        point_id::bigint AS rid,
        SUM(ABS(point)) AS redeem_points
    FROM transaction_points
    WHERE pointable_type = 'Reward'
      AND pointable_id != 9
      AND created_at >= '2026-03-01 00:00:00'
      AND created_at <= '2026-03-31 23:59:59'
    GROUP BY point_id
),

p AS (
    SELECT
        id::bigint,
        user_id::bigint AS uid,
        point AS balance
    FROM points
),

final AS (
    SELECT
        p.uid,
        ua.customer_type,
        p.balance,
        cp.collect_points,
        r.redeem_points,
        dl.total_lucky_draws
    FROM collect_points cp
    JOIN p
        ON cp.cpid = p.id
    LEFT JOIN redeem r
        ON p.id = r.rid
    LEFT JOIN ua
        ON ua.uid = p.uid
    LEFT JOIN dl
        ON ua.uid = dl.uid
)

SELECT
    customer_type,
    COUNT(DISTINCT uid) FILTER (
        WHERE collect_points >= 1
          AND (redeem_points IS NULL OR redeem_points = 0)
    ) AS user_only_collect_point,
    
    COUNT(DISTINCT uid) FILTER (
        WHERE collect_points >= 1
          AND redeem_points IS NOT NULL
    ) AS user_collect_point_and_redeem

FROM final
GROUP BY customer_type;
